description: Validate BAM/bigWig/BED input files for deepTools analysis — checks file existence/readability, BAM index (.bai) presence, and basic BED format correctness.
rules: read-only — inspects files, never modifies them
at least one of BAM_FILES / BIGWIG_FILES / BED_FILES must be non-empty
each var is a space-separated list of paths
full validation report written to record_store/validation.txt
pure Python stdlib — no deepTools or science library required
usage: Set any of BAM_FILES, BIGWIG_FILES, BED_FILES (space-separated path lists; leave unused ones empty). Output: validation.txt.
limitation: Structural checks only: BAM index existence (not BAM body integrity), bigWig size sanity, and BED column/coordinate format on the first 10 rows. Does not parse BAM/bigWig binary contents.
